title: Brit说他不是《纽约时报》点名的比特币创造者
originalTitle: Brit says he is not elusive Bitcoin creator named by New York Times
summary: 这位英国计算机科学家和企业家否认自己是《纽约时报》认定的中本聪。
originalSummary: The British computer scientist and entrepreneur has denied being the man who the New York Times identified at Satoshi Nakamoto.
